heroSection.title: Epic Seven Automation
heroSection.subTitle: Python + OpenCV Game Tool
heroSection.description: Autonomous in-game automation tool using image recognition to execute repetitive tasks.

mainContent.overview: Engineered a Python + OpenCV automation tool using image recognition to execute repetitive in-game tasks autonomously.

keyFeature.body: OpenCV computer vision detects game elements automatically
Handles repetitive tasks such as shop refresh and arena battles

keyFeature.header: Multiple Emulator And Screen Size Ready
keyFeature.body: Fully functional automation script for multiple emulators and screen size

walkthrough.description: Clean, intuitive launcher interface built with Python 3.11 and Tkinter. The entry point to the Epic Seven Automation Tool — select your ADB-connected emulator and launch automated tasks without ever losing keyboard or mouse control. Supports LD Player, BlueStacks, Google Play Games, and even physical Android devices with USB debugging enabled.

Fully automated secret shop refresh loop. Navigate to the shop page, input desired refresh iterations (starting from 0), and let OpenCV-powered image recognition handle every tap, swipe, and purchase autonomously. Support multiple emulators and screen sizes, ensuring a seamless experience regardless of your setup.

Advanced NPC arena automation. Input base challenge count and optionally enable Arena With Extra to purchase friendship bookmarks for +5 extra flags. The tool intelligently handles the full loop while you multitask.
